title: Even Microsoft couldn’t make Windows 11 work well on 8GB of RAM
excerpt: Microsoft’s new entry-level 13-inch Surface Laptop pairs last year’s great hardware with a higher price and just 8GB of RAM. Thanks, RAMageddon.
content_html:
Last year, Microsoft’s 13-inch Surface Laptop quickly became one of my favorite thin-and-light Windows notebooks. At $900, it was easy to recommend to anyone wanting MacBook Air–like build quality and battery life on Windows — I even convinced my sister to buy one on sale.

But that was last year. This year, thanks to RAMageddon, that same laptop costs $950, and now that price gets you half as much RAM — just 8GB. It’s the same great hardware on the outside, but it’s not the same laptop on the inside.

It’s been a long time since we tested a Windows laptop with so little RAM. We’ve been saying for years that 8GB isn’t enough. But this is Microsoft’s laptop, and Windows 11 is Microsoft’s operating system. Maybe it’ll be good enough.

It’s not.

6

Verge Score

$950

The Good

  • Same great build, hardware, and battery life as last year

The Bad

  • 8GB of RAM on Windows 11 isn’t enough
  • Costs more than last year’s model, and with worse specs
  • 256GB of storage feels more limiting now that SSD prices are through the roof

All the good things I wrote about last year’s hardware still ring true: The keyboard is nice and tactile, the trackpad is great (only outdone by ones that allow you to click corner-to-corner), the webcam is sharp and clear, and the battery goes and goes — easily lasting 10 hours. The processor, an eight-core Snapdragon X Plus, is nearly identical to the one in the Surface Laptop I reviewed last year. In fact, it has a slightly faster boost speed. In last year’s Surface Laptop, it was a solid performer and could even handle light photo editing in Lightroom Classic. But last year’s model had 16GB of RAM. It turns out that makes a big difference.

Component report card

  • Screen: B
  • Webcam: B
  • Keyboard: B
  • Trackpad: B
  • Port selection: C
  • Speakers: C
  • Number of ugly stickers to remove: 0

While the 8GB Surface was usually fine for basic web browsing or video streaming, I occasionally nudged it a bit too far in everyday use. I was on a Microsoft Teams call (using the app, not a browser) when the host streamed a brief video, which made the whole laptop hang for several seconds. At the time, I had about 10 Chrome tabs open across two desktops, alongside Slack and Signal — not an obscene level of multitasking. And we didn’t even have our webcams on.

The Surface Laptop would hang for a few seconds like this several times a day, even when I thought I wasn’t pushing it too hard. I’ve had these temporary freezes while just working in some Google Docs — no Teams call running or anything streaming in the background. It’s only a couple times a day on average, but that’s still too often.

Keeping the Performance tab open in Task Manager showed I was almost always using around 6.7GB of the available 7.6GB of available memory. After a fresh reboot with bare minimum startup apps running, Windows was using 4.2GB of RAM. That’s around the minimum Microsoft requires just to run Windows 11, highlighting how little headroom there is with 8GB of RAM. Limiting myself to about six Chrome tabs, closing Signal, and refraining from using any virtual desktops kept the memory usage to about 5.5GB.

Is this all workable for light loads? Yes. Do I want to live my life being super cautious about how many apps I’m running and how many tabs I leave open on a brand-new $950 laptop? Absolutely not. And if it’s choking on day one, how usable is it going to be in five years?

The same concerns can be said of the MacBook Neo, which also has just 8GB of RAM. But macOS is a bit better with RAM — and more to the point, in my testing, the Neo could handle more multitasking. A Neo won’t have the shelf life of a MacBook Air, but it also costs $250 less than the Surface Laptop (even after Apple’s recent price increase).

Microsoft has claimed its focus this year is improving the performance of Windows 11 and making it more reliable, especially for lower-cost hardware, to compete with the Neo. But if we’re really going back to 8GB as the starting point for Windows laptops, there’s a lot more work to be done. It’s of course ironic that Microsoft needs to address this problem when it’s one of the major perpetrators of the ongoing RAM crunch. Perhaps Microsoft doesn’t care that its flagship Surface line will suffer for its AI obsession, but it still sucks to see.

We haven’t reviewed a Windows laptop with just 8GB of RAM in more than three years. Unfortunately, the Surface Laptop won’t be the last. The recent Computex show also brought announcements for upcoming laptops with 8GB of memory from Dell, Acer, and Asus. With the RAM shortage likely to last years, we’re going to see more and more 8GB offerings so manufacturers still have something “entry-level” to offer.

But if even Microsoft can’t make a Windows laptop that runs well on 8GB RAM, what hope do OEMs have? 8GB is not enough for a Windows laptop in 2026. Barring Microsoft actually de-bloating Windows 11 enough to accommodate lower-spec computers, your best bet is to spend more and get something with 16GB of RAM — like the same Surface Laptop for $1,150, something from another manufacturer that still sees some decent sales, or look into refurbs and open-box models from reputable sources. Or just cop out and get a MacBook Neo.

Prices could still go up. The $950 8GB Surface Laptop of today could very well be the $1,050 8GB Surface Laptop of next year, or the $1,200 8GB Surface Laptop of the following year.

This is our new normal for computing. The 13-inch Surface Laptop initially offered respectable tradeoffs for a fair discount — “a little less for a little less,” as I put it then. Now the new base model offers even less for more. RAMageddon has altered the deal. It’ll probably get worse.

2026 Microsoft Surface Laptop 13-inch (8GB) specs (as reviewed)

  • Display: 13-inch (1920 x 1280) 60Hz touchscreen
  • CPU: Qualcomm Snapdragon X Plus X1P-46-100
  • RAM: 8GB LPDDR5X (non-replaceable)
  • Storage: 256GB UFS
  • Webcam: 1080p
  • Connectivity: Wi-Fi 7, Bluetooth 5.4
  • Ports: 1x USB-A 3.1, 2x USB-C 3.2, 3.5mm combo audio jack
  • Biometrics: Fingerprint sensor in power button
  • Weight: 2.7 pounds
  • Dimensions: 11.25 x 8.43 x 0.61 inches / 285.8 x 214.1 x 15.5mm
  • Battery: 50Wh
  • Price: $949.99

Photography by Antonio G. Di Benedetto / The Verge

sentences.en: Last year, Microsoft’s 13-inch Surface Laptop quickly became one of my favorite thin-and-light Windows notebooks.
sentences.zh: 去年，微软的 13 英寸 Surface Laptop 迅速成为我最喜欢的轻薄 Windows 笔记本电脑之一。

sentences.en: At $900, it was easy to recommend to anyone wanting MacBook Air–like build quality and battery life on Windows — I even convinced my sister to buy one on sale.
sentences.zh: 售价 900 美元，很容易推荐给任何想要 MacBook Air 的人——就像 Windows 上的构建质量和电池寿命——我什至说服我姐姐在打折时购买了一台。

blocks.html_en: But that was last year. This year, thanks to RAMageddon, that same laptop costs $950, and now that price gets you half as much RAM — just 8GB. It’s the same great hardware on the outside, but it’s not the same laptop on the inside.

sentences.zh: 但那是去年的事了。

sentences.en: This year, thanks to RAMageddon, that same laptop costs $950, and now that price gets you half as much RAM — just 8GB.
sentences.zh: 今年，多亏了 RAMgeddon，同样的笔记本电脑售价为 950 美元，而现在这个价格可以让你获得一半的内存——只需 8GB。

sentences.en: It’s the same great hardware on the outside, but it’s not the same laptop on the inside.
sentences.zh: 从外观上看，它们的硬件相同，但内部却不是同一款笔记本电脑。

blocks.html_en: It’s been a long time since we tested a Windows laptop with so little RAM. We’ve been saying for years that 8GB isn’t enough. But this is Microsoft’s laptop, and Windows 11 is Microsoft’s operating system. Maybe it’ll be good enough.

sentences.zh: 我们已经很久没有测试过 RAM 这么小的 Windows 笔记本电脑了。

sentences.en: We’ve been saying for years that 8GB isn’t enough.
sentences.zh: 多年来我们一直在说 8GB 是不够的。

sentences.en: But this is Microsoft’s laptop, and Windows 11 is Microsoft’s operating system.
sentences.zh: 但这是微软的笔记本电脑，Windows 11是微软的操作系统。
也许这就足够了。
它不是。

好的

In last year’s Surface Laptop, it was a solid performer and could even handle light photo editing in Lightroom Classic. But last year’s model had 16GB of RAM. sentences.zh: 我写的有关去年硬件的所有优点仍然是真实的：键盘漂亮且有触感，触控板很棒（唯一比那些允许您从角落到角落点击的触控板更出色），网络摄像头清晰锐利，电池电量不断消耗 - 轻松持续 10 小时。

sentences.en: The processor, an eight-core Snapdragon X Plus, is nearly identical to the one in the Surface Laptop I reviewed last year.
sentences.zh: 该处理器是八核 Snapdragon X Plus，与我去年评测的 Surface 笔记本电脑中的处理器几乎相同。

sentences.en: But last year’s model had 16GB of RAM.
sentences.zh: 但去年的型号有 16GB RAM。

sentences.en: It turns out that makes a big difference.
sentences.zh: 事实证明，这有很大的不同。

sentences.zh: 重新启动并运行最低限度的启动应用程序后，Windows 使用 4.2GB RAM。

sentences.en: That’s around the minimum Microsoft requires just to run Windows 11, highlighting how little headroom there is with 8GB of RAM.
sentences.zh: 这大约是微软运行 Windows 11 的最低要求，凸显出 8GB RAM 的空间是多么有限。

sentences.en: Limiting myself to about six Chrome tabs, closing Signal, and refraining from using any virtual desktops kept the memory usage to about 5.5GB.
sentences.zh: 将自己限制在大约六个 Chrome 选项卡、关闭 Signal 并避免使用任何虚拟桌面，使内存使用量保持在 5.5GB 左右。

blocks.html_en: Is this all workable for light loads? Yes. Do I want to live my life being super cautious about how many apps I’m running and how many tabs I leave open on a brand-new $950 laptop? Absolutely not. And if it’s choking on day one, how usable is it going to be in five years?

sentences.en: Is this all workable for light loads?
sentences.zh: 这对于轻负载来说都可行吗？
是的。

sentences.en: Do I want to live my life being super cautious about how many apps I’m running and how many tabs I leave open on a brand-new $950 laptop?
sentences.zh: 我是否想在一台价值 950 美元的全新笔记本电脑上对自己正在运行的应用程序数量以及打开的选项卡数量保持高度谨慎？
绝对不是。

sentences.en: And if it’s choking on day one, how usable is it going to be in five years?
sentences.zh: 如果它在第一天就令人窒息，那么五年后它会有多大用处？

But macOS is a bit better with RAM — and more to the point, in my testing, the Neo could handle more multitasking. A Neo won’t have the shelf life of a MacBook Air, but it also costs $250 less than the Surface Laptop (even after Apple’s recent price increase).

sentences.en: The same concerns can be said of the MacBook Neo, which also has just 8GB of RAM.
sentences.zh: MacBook Neo 也有同样的担忧，它也只有 8GB RAM。

sentences.en: But macOS is a bit better with RAM — and more to the point, in my testing, the Neo could handle more multitasking.
sentences.zh: 但 macOS 在 RAM 方面要好一些，更重要的是，在我的测试中，Neo 可以处理更多的多任务处理。

sentences.en: A Neo won’t have the shelf life of a MacBook Air, but it also costs $250 less than the Surface Laptop (even after Apple’s recent price increase).
sentences.zh: Neo 不会有 MacBook Air 的保质期，但它的价格也比 Surface Laptop 低 250 美元（即使在苹果最近涨价之后）。

blocks.html_en: Microsoft has claimed its focus this year is improving the performance of Windows 11 and making it more reliable, especially for lower-cost hardware, to compete with the Neo. But if we’re really going back to 8GB as the starting point for Windows laptops, there’s a lot more work to be done. It’s of course ironic that Microsoft needs to address this problem when it’s one of the major perpetrators of the ongoing RAM crunch. Perhaps Microsoft doesn’t care that its flagship Surface line will suffer for its AI obsession, but it still sucks to see.

sentences.en: Microsoft has claimed its focus this year is improving the performance of Windows 11 and making it more reliable, especially for lower-cost hardware, to compete with the Neo.
sentences.zh: 微软声称今年的重点是提高 Windows 11 的性能并使其更加可靠，特别是对于低成本硬件，以与 Neo 竞争。

sentences.en: But if we’re really going back to 8GB as the starting point for Windows laptops, there’s a lot more work to be done.
sentences.zh: 但如果我们真的要回到 8GB 作为 Windows 笔记本电脑的起点，还有很多工作要做。

sentences.en: It’s of course ironic that Microsoft needs to address this problem when it’s one of the major perpetrators of the ongoing RAM crunch.
sentences.zh: 具有讽刺意味的是，当微软是当前 RAM 紧缺的主要肇事者之一时，它需要解决这个问题。

sentences.en: Perhaps Microsoft doesn’t care that its flagship Surface line will suffer for its AI obsession, but it still sucks to see.
sentences.zh: 也许微软并不关心其旗舰产品 Surface 系列会因其对人工智能的痴迷而受到影响，但它仍然令人遗憾。

blocks.html_en: We haven’t reviewed a Windows laptop with just 8GB of RAM in more than three years. Unfortunately, the Surface Laptop won’t be the last. The recent Computex show also brought announcements for upcoming laptops with 8GB of memory from Dell, Acer, and Asus. With the RAM shortage likely to last years, we’re going to see more and more 8GB offerings so manufacturers still have something “entry-level” to offer.

sentences.en: We haven’t reviewed a Windows laptop with just 8GB of RAM in more than three years.
sentences.zh: 我们已经三年多没有评测过只有 8GB RAM 的 Windows 笔记本电脑了。

sentences.en: Unfortunately, the Surface Laptop won’t be the last.
sentences.zh: 不幸的是，Surface Laptop 不会是最后一个。

sentences.en: The recent Computex show also brought announcements for upcoming laptops with 8GB of memory from Dell, Acer, and Asus.
sentences.zh: 最近的 Computex 展会还宣布了戴尔、宏碁和华硕即将推出的 8GB 内存笔记本电脑。

sentences.en: With the RAM shortage likely to last years, we’re going to see more and more 8GB offerings so manufacturers still have something “entry-level” to offer.
sentences.zh: 由于 RAM 短缺可能会持续几年，我们将看到越来越多的 8GB 产品，因此制造商仍然可以提供“入门级”产品。

blocks.html_en: But if even Microsoft can’t make a Windows laptop that runs well on 8GB RAM, what hope do OEMs have? 8GB is not enough for a Windows laptop in 2026. Barring Microsoft actually de-bloating Windows 11 enough to accommodate lower-spec computers, your best bet is to spend more and get something with 16GB of RAM — like the same Surface Laptop for $1,150, something from another manufacturer that still sees some decent sales, or look into refurbs and open-box models from reputable sources. Or just cop out and get a MacBook Neo.

sentences.en: But if even Microsoft can’t make a Windows laptop that runs well on 8GB RAM, what hope do OEMs have?
sentences.zh: 但如果连微软都无法制造出一款在 8GB RAM 上运行良好的 Windows 笔记本电脑，那么 OEM 们还有什么希望呢？

sentences.en: 8GB is not enough for a Windows laptop in 2026.
sentences.zh: 8GB 对于 2026 年的 Windows 笔记本电脑来说是不够的。

sentences.en: Barring Microsoft actually de-bloating Windows 11 enough to accommodate lower-spec computers, your best bet is to spend more and get something with 16GB of RAM — like the same Surface Laptop for $1,150, something from another manufacturer that still sees some decent sales, or look into refurbs and open-box models from reputable sources.
sentences.zh: 除非微软真的对 Windows 11 进行足够的精简以适应较低规格的计算机，否则你最好的选择是花更多的钱购买具有 16GB RAM 的产品 - 比如售价 1,150 美元的同一款 Surface 笔记本电脑，来自另一家仍然销量不错的制造商的产品，或者从信誉良好的来源寻找翻新和开箱型号。

sentences.en: Or just cop out and get a MacBook Neo.
sentences.zh: 或者干脆逃避并购买 MacBook Neo。

blocks.html_en: Prices could still go up. The $950 8GB Surface Laptop of today could very well be the $1,050 8GB Surface Laptop of next year, or the $1,200 8GB Surface Laptop of the following year.

sentences.zh: 价格仍有可能上涨。

sentences.en: The $950 8GB Surface Laptop of today could very well be the $1,050 8GB Surface Laptop of next year, or the $1,200 8GB Surface Laptop of the following year.
sentences.zh: 今天的 950 美元 8GB Surface Laptop 很可能是明年的 1,050 美元 8GB Surface Laptop，或者明年的 1,200 美元 8GB Surface Laptop。

blocks.html_en: This is our new normal for computing. The 13-inch Surface Laptop initially offered respectable tradeoffs for a fair discount — “a little less for a little less,” as I put it then. Now the new base model offers even less for more. RAMageddon has altered the deal. It’ll probably get worse.

sentences.en: This is our new normal for computing.
sentences.zh: 这是我们的计算新常态。

sentences.en: The 13-inch Surface Laptop initially offered respectable tradeoffs for a fair discount — “a little less for a little less,” as I put it then.
sentences.zh: 13 英寸 Surface Laptop 最初以合理的折扣提供了可观的折衷方案 - 正如我当时所说的那样，“少一点就少一点”。

sentences.en: Now the new base model offers even less for more.
sentences.zh: 现在，新的基本型号提供了更少的功能和更多的功能。
拉米吉登改变了交易。
情况可能会变得更糟。
2026 年 Microsoft Surface 笔记本电脑 13 英寸 (8GB) 规格（经审查）

blocks.html_en: • Antonio G. Di Benedetto

sentences.zh: 安东尼奥·G.
本尼迪克特

content_html_zh:
去年，微软的 13 英寸 Surface Laptop 迅速成为我最喜欢的轻薄 Windows 笔记本电脑之一。 售价 900 美元，很容易推荐给任何想要 MacBook Air 的人——就像 Windows 上的构建质量和电池寿命——我什至说服我姐姐在打折时购买了一台。

但那是去年的事了。 今年，多亏了 RAMgeddon，同样的笔记本电脑售价为 950 美元，而现在这个价格可以让你获得一半的内存——只需 8GB。 从外观上看，它们的硬件相同，但内部却不是同一款笔记本电脑。

我们已经很久没有测试过 RAM 这么小的 Windows 笔记本电脑了。 多年来我们一直在说 8GB 是不够的。 但这是微软的笔记本电脑，Windows 11是微软的操作系统。 也许这就足够了。

它不是。

6

边缘分数

$950

好的

  • 与去年一样出色的构造、硬件和电池寿命

坏处

  • Windows 11 上的 8GB RAM 不够用
  • 成本比去年的型号更高，而且规格更差
  • 由于 SSD 价格飞涨，256GB 存储空间显得更加有限

我写的有关去年硬件的所有优点仍然是真实的：键盘漂亮且有触感，触控板很棒（唯一比那些允许您从角落到角落点击的触控板更出色），网络摄像头清晰锐利，电池电量不断消耗 - 轻松持续 10 小时。 该处理器是八核 Snapdragon X Plus，与我去年评测的 Surface 笔记本电脑中的处理器几乎相同。 事实上，它的升压速度稍快一些。 在去年的 Surface Laptop 中，它表现出色，甚至可以在 Lightroom Classic 中处理简单的照片编辑。 但去年的型号有 16GB RAM。 事实证明，这有很大的不同。

成分报告卡

  • 屏幕：B
  • 网络摄像头：B
  • 键盘：B
  • 触控板：B
  • 端口选择：C
  • 演讲者：C
  • 要移除的丑陋贴纸数量：0

虽然 8GB Surface 通常足以满足基本的网页浏览或视频流传输，但我偶尔在日常使用中将其推得太远。 我正在参加 Microsoft Teams 通话（使用该应用程序，而不是浏览器），当时主持人播放了一段简短的视频，导致整个笔记本电脑挂起几秒钟。 当时，我在两个桌面上打开了大约 10 个 Chrome 选项卡，还有 Slack 和 Signal，这还不算多任务处理的糟糕程度。 我们甚至没有打开网络摄像头。

Surface Laptop 每天都会出现几次像这样挂起几秒钟的情况，即使我认为我没有太用力。 我在处理一些 Google 文档时遇到了这些暂时的冻结 - 没有团队调用运行或任何在后台流式传输。 平均每天只有几次，但这仍然太频繁了。

在任务管理器中保持性能选项卡打开显示我几乎总是使用 7.6GB 可用内存中的大约 6.7GB。 重新启动并运行最低限度的启动应用程序后，Windows 使用 4.2GB RAM。 这大约是微软运行 Windows 11 的最低要求，凸显出 8GB RAM 的空间是多么有限。 将自己限制在大约六个 Chrome 选项卡、关闭 Signal 并避免使用任何虚拟桌面，使内存使用量保持在 5.5GB 左右。

这对于轻负载来说都可行吗？ 是的。 我是否想在一台价值 950 美元的全新笔记本电脑上对自己正在运行的应用程序数量以及打开的选项卡数量保持高度谨慎？ 绝对不是。 如果它在第一天就令人窒息，那么五年后它会有多大用处？

MacBook Neo 也有同样的担忧，它也只有 8GB RAM。 但 macOS 在 RAM 方面要好一些，更重要的是，在我的测试中，Neo 可以处理更多的多任务处理。 Neo 不会有 MacBook Air 的保质期，但它的价格也比 Surface Laptop 低 250 美元（即使在苹果最近涨价之后）。

微软声称今年的重点是提高 Windows 11 的性能并使其更加可靠，特别是对于低成本硬件，以与 Neo 竞争。 但如果我们真的要回到 8GB 作为 Windows 笔记本电脑的起点，还有很多工作要做。 具有讽刺意味的是，当微软是当前 RAM 紧缺的主要肇事者之一时，它需要解决这个问题。 也许微软并不关心其旗舰产品 Surface 系列会因其对人工智能的痴迷而受到影响，但它仍然令人遗憾。

我们已经三年多没有评测过只有 8GB RAM 的 Windows 笔记本电脑了。 不幸的是，Surface Laptop 不会是最后一个。 最近的 Computex 展会还宣布了戴尔、宏碁和华硕即将推出的 8GB 内存笔记本电脑。 由于 RAM 短缺可能会持续几年，我们将看到越来越多的 8GB 产品，因此制造商仍然可以提供“入门级”产品。

但如果连微软都无法制造出一款在 8GB RAM 上运行良好的 Windows 笔记本电脑，那么 OEM 们还有什么希望呢？ 8GB 对于 2026 年的 Windows 笔记本电脑来说是不够的。 除非微软真的对 Windows 11 进行足够的精简以适应较低规格的计算机，否则你最好的选择是花更多的钱购买具有 16GB RAM 的产品 - 比如售价 1,150 美元的同一款 Surface 笔记本电脑，来自另一家仍然销量不错的制造商的产品，或者从信誉良好的来源寻找翻新和开箱型号。 或者干脆逃避并购买 MacBook Neo。

价格仍有可能上涨。 今天的 950 美元 8GB Surface Laptop 很可能是明年的 1,050 美元 8GB Surface Laptop，或者明年的 1,200 美元 8GB Surface Laptop。

这是我们的计算新常态。 13 英寸 Surface Laptop 最初以合理的折扣提供了可观的折衷方案 - 正如我当时所说的那样，“少一点就少一点”。 现在，新的基本型号提供了更少的功能和更多的功能。 拉米吉登改变了交易。 情况可能会变得更糟。

2026 年 Microsoft Surface 笔记本电脑 13 英寸 (8GB) 规格（经审查）

  • 显示屏：13 英寸 (1920 x 1280) 60Hz 触摸屏
  • CPU：高通 Snapdragon X Plus X1P-46-100
  • RAM：8GB LPDDR5X（不可更换）
  • 存储：256GB UFS
  • 网络摄像头：1080p
  • 连接性：Wi-Fi 7、蓝牙 5.4
  • 端口：1 个 USB-A 3.1、2 个 USB-C 3.2、3.5 毫米组合音频插孔
  • 生物识别技术：电源按钮中的指纹传感器
  • 重量：2.7磅
  • 尺寸：11.25 x 8.43 x 0.61 英寸/285.8 x 214.1 x 15.5 毫米
  • 电池：50瓦时
  • Price: $949.99

摄影：Antonio G. 迪贝内代托 / The Verge
